creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 196127
patch file

* Update to 34.1
* Add runtime dependency on devel/go-gocode and install LiteIDE gotools helper [1] so users get working code formatting and autocomplete w/o additional post-installation steps; remove pkg-message
* Address danfe@ feedback on flavors.

Changelog: https://github.com/visualfc/liteide/releases/tag/x34.1

QA:
  poudriere testport: OK (112a, 104i)

[1] https://github.com/visualfc/gotools
